texto: What does this mean? Simply that to make DNA, you have to have DNA in the first place! You have to have the DNA code within the cell before you can make more DNA code. Without the complete code in the first place, there is no way to make the code necessary for every living cell!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lawrence O. Richards que provoca temas ligados a vida. Ao questionar “What does this mean? Simply that to make DNA, you have to have DNA in the first place! You have t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, creation-science, science, com foco em science.
